title: Aparna Constructions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Aparna Constructions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
